item.title: 油轮穿越霍尔木兹海峡，美股期货上涨
item.description: 随着投资者对霍尔木兹海峡长期封锁可能影响全球供应链的担忧有所缓解，美国股市周一有望上涨。【原文：US stocks are set to rise Monday as investor concerns that the prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz would impact global supply chains abate.】

item.title: 摩根大通启动与EA收购案相关的57.5亿美元贷款发售
item.description: 以摩根大通为首的华尔街银行启动了一笔57.5亿美元的跨境杠杆贷款发行，旨在为收购视频游戏制造商艺电公司（Electronic Arts Inc.）提供资金支持，这是同类交易中规模最大的之一。【原文：Wall Street banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. kicked off a $5.75 billion cross-border leveraged loan sale to help finance the buyout of video game maker Electronic Arts Inc., one of the largest transactions of its kind.】

item.title: 富达投资支持的人工智能芯片散热公司Frore在最新一轮融资中估值达16.4亿美元
item.description: 专注于人工智能芯片液冷技术的Frore Systems公司完成了一笔1.43亿美元的融资，此轮融资使该初创企业的估值达到16.4亿美元。【原文：Frore Systems Inc., which makes liquid cooling technology for AI chips, raised $143 million in a funding deal that values the startup at $1.64 billion.】

item.title: 特朗普对伊朗的战争及其关税政策面临历史包袱
item.description: 美国总统正在将他的战争带来的经济和政治双重冲击，叠加在他此前实施的关税政策之上。【原文：The US president is layering the joint economic and political shock of his war on top of that of his tariffs.】

item.title: 国际清算银行称，白银暴跌因“破坏稳定的”杠杆ETF热潮而加剧
item.description: 据国际清算银行称，1月底白银市场遭遇了史上最严重的抛售，而散户投资者在杠杆型交易所交易基金中的参与度日益增加，进一步加剧了这一抛售潮。【原文：The worst silver sell-off in history at the end of January was accelerated by the growing footprint of retail investors in leveraged exchange-traded funds, according to the Bank for International Settlements.】

item.title: 国际清算银行警告称，若伊朗冲突持续，将引发经济风险
item.description: 国际清算银行警告称，中东地区若爆发长期战争并导致通胀预期失控，最终可能引发金融市场动荡和财政困境。【原文：A prolonged war in the Middle East that dislodges inflation expectations could ultimately result in financial-market fallout and fiscal trouble, the Bank for International Settlements warned.】

item.title: 爱尔兰的哈里斯表示，欧盟储蓄联盟有望在今年筹备就绪
item.description: 爱尔兰财政部长表示，他相信，经过成员国之间多年关于运作方式的争论，这一期待已久的、规模达数万亿欧元的欧洲储蓄与投资联盟即将达成协议。【原文：Ireland’s Finance Minister said he is confident a long-awaited multi-trillion-euro European saving and investments union is close to getting over the line after years of sparring between member states over how it would work.】

item.title: 巴西通胀预期在利率决议前夕大幅攀升
item.description: 巴西经济学家上调了今年通胀率和基准利率的预测，这在央行决策者即将决定借贷成本的前几天，为货币政策前景增添了不确定性。【原文：Brazil economists raised their inflation and benchmark interest rate forecasts for this year, adding tension to the monetary policy outlook just days before central bankers decide on borrowing costs.】

item.title: 阿波罗正就以40亿欧元估值收购Syntegon的股权进行谈判
item.description: 知情人士透露，阿波罗全球管理公司（Apollo Global Management Inc.）正就收购Syntegon的重大少数股权进行谈判。Syntegon是一家由CVC Capital Partners Plc持有的德国包装机械制造商。【原文：Apollo Global Management Inc. is in talks to buy a significant minority stake in Syntegon, the German packaging machine maker owned by CVC Capital Partners Plc, people with knowledge of the matter said.】

item.title: 美国盘前领涨股：Meta、National Storage、Sable Offshore
item.description: 截至纽约时间上午7点50分，标普500指数期货上涨0.8%；受市场预期将有更多油轮能够通过霍尔木兹海峡的提振，油价涨幅收窄。【原文：S&P 500 Index futures rise 0.8% as of 7:50 a.m. in New York and oil prices reversed an advance on hopes that more tankers could traverse the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 塞内加尔通过大规模区域借贷为解决债务危机争取了时间
item.description: 投资者和分析师表示，塞内加尔对快速增长的区域债务市场的依赖，既缓解了非洲风险最高信贷所面临的压力，同时也推迟了关于债务重组的讨论。【原文：Senegal’s reliance on a fast-growing regional debt market is easing pressure on Africa’s riskiest credit while delaying discussions about debt restructuring, investors and analysts say.】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡封锁期间，阿联酋石油产量锐减近半
item.description: 一位知情人士表示，随着霍尔木兹海峡事实上被封锁，阿联酋的日均石油产量已减少近一半。【原文：The United Arab Emirates’ ​daily oil output is down by almost half following the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a person familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 斯塔克拉夫特首席执行官反对威胁可再生能源的电力市场改革
item.description: 据该地区最大的可再生能源生产商斯塔特克拉夫特公司（Statkraft AS）称，欧洲监管机构应避免调整电价，以免危及对清洁能源的投资。【原文：European regulators should avoid adjusting electricity pricing in case it puts at risk investment in clean energy, according to Statkraft AS, the region’s top producer of renewable power.】

item.title: 无纸化欧元债券发行首次亮相于规模达15.3万亿欧元的市场
item.description: 作为全球最大的债券市场之一，欧洲债券市场正逐步淘汰纸质债券。【原文：The Eurobond market, one of the world’s largest debt markets, is moving to ditch paper.】

item.title: 英国因金融申诉专员服务处越权而对其权限进行限制
item.description: 英国计划限制金融申诉专员服务局的职权，因为该机构在处理包括数十亿英镑汽车贷款丑闻在内的案件时，曾充当“准监管机构”。【原文：The UK plans to curb the powers of the Financial Ombudsman Service after it acted as a “quasi regulator” during cases including the multibillion-pound motor finance scandal.】

item.title: 伯格姆表示，伊朗战争促使亚洲国家对进口美国能源产生兴趣
item.description: 内政部长道格·伯格姆表示，中东战争对石油和天然气供应造成的干扰，促使亚洲国家重新对从美国进口更多能源产生了兴趣。【原文：The Mideast war’s disruption of oil and gas flows is prompting new interest from Asian countries in importing more energy from the US, Interior Secretary Doug Burgum said.】

item.title: 老年住房房地产投资信托基金Janus Living计划通过首次公开募股筹集最高7.4亿美元
item.description: 专注于老年人的房地产投资信托基金Janus Living Inc.正计划通过首次公开募股筹集7.4亿美元，这可能使其估值高达50亿美元。【原文：Janus Living Inc., a seniors-focused real estate investment trust, is seeking to raise $740 million in an initial public offering, which could give it a valuation of as much as $5 billion.】

item.title: 马斯克旗下的xAI正招聘信贷专家和银行家，以培养Grok Finance团队
item.description: 埃隆·马斯克旗下的人工智能初创公司xAI正计划招聘银行家和私人信贷贷款人，以提升其Grok聊天机器人在金融策略方面的能力，从而加入竞争对手行列，共同向投资专业人士推广相关软件。【原文：Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence startup xAI is looking to hire bankers and private credit lenders to make its Grok chatbot better at finance strategy, joining rival AI firms in pushing software for investing professionals.】

item.title: VinFast将重启美国电动车工厂建设，亏损持续扩大
item.description: 越南电动汽车制造商VinFast Auto Ltd.表示，今年将重启其北卡罗来纳州工厂的建设，同时报告称第四季度亏损扩大，原因是与全球扩张相关的成本持续上升。【原文：Vietnamese electric vehicle maker VinFast Auto Ltd. said it will resume construction on its North Carolina factory this year while reporting a wider loss in the fourth quarter as costs tied to its global expansion continued to rise.】

item.title: 据称，亚洲的DayOne数据中心即将提交美国IPO的保密申请
item.description: 知情人士透露，DayOne Data Centers Ltd. 即将秘密提交在美国进行首次公开募股的申请，这为在人工智能热潮中蓬勃发展的该行业又一笔数十亿美元的交易铺平了道路。【原文：DayOne Data Centers Ltd. is close to filing confidentially for an initial public offering in the US, people familiar with the matter said, paving the way for another multibillion-dollar deal in an industry riding the artificial intelligence boom.】

item.title: 随着对乌拉尔原油的需求增长，俄罗斯原油在印度的价格创下新高
item.description: 在美国放宽允许各国购买俄罗斯原油的许可后，俄罗斯主要出口原油混合油运抵印度的价格创下历史新高。【原文：Prices for Russia’s key export blend delivered to India hit a record high after the US widened its permit allowing countries to buy the nation’s crude.】

item.title: Zoox 正在验证我们所说的“机器人出租车”究竟意味着什么
item.description: 没有方向盘的自动驾驶汽车给乘客和监管机构带来了挑战【原文：The steering wheel-less autonomous car poses challenges for riders and regulators】

item.title: 伊朗战争爆发，各国央行面临新的通胀威胁
item.description: 本周，负责制定占全球经济总量三分之二的利率的官员们将举行货币政策会议。【原文：Officials setting interest rates for two thirds of the world economy hold monetary policy meetings this week.】

item.title: CoreWeave与BCE将共同支持加拿大西部大型数据中心项目
item.description: CoreWeave Inc.、Cerebras Systems Inc. 以及电信公司 BCE Inc. 将合作在萨斯喀彻温省建设加拿大最强大的数据中心之一，该项目的第一阶段预计将于明年上半年投入运营。【原文：CoreWeave Inc., Cerebras Systems Inc. and telecommunications firm BCE Inc. will collaborate on one of Canada’s most powerful data centers in Saskatchewan, with a first phase expected to come online in the first half of next year.】

item.title: 各国央行正面临引发市场动荡的通胀担忧
item.description: 美联储、欧洲央行及其他机构的决策者自战争爆发以来首次举行会议。【原文：Policymakers from Fed, ECB, others meet for first time since war’s outbreak.】

item.title: 据称，信实工业正与六家银行合作，筹备Jio在印度的首次公开募股
item.description: 据知情人士透露，信实工业有限公司正与六家银行合作，筹备其电信子公司Jio Platforms Ltd.的股份出售计划，预计不久后还将增加更多顾问。【原文：Reliance Industries Ltd. is working with half a dozen banks for the planned share sale of its telecom unit, Jio Platforms Ltd., with more advisers likely to be added soon, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 阿里巴巴计划进行重大改革，以更加专注于人工智能领域的盈利
item.description: 阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司正组建一个业务部门，旨在将其庞大的AI服务和开发项目整合到一个统一的框架下，这表明了该公司决心从人工智能领域获利。【原文：Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. is setting up a business unit to bring its sprawling AI services and development endeavors under a single umbrella, signaling its determination to profit off artificial intelligence.】

item.title: 中国OPPO发布全球首款无折痕折叠屏手机
item.description: 在苹果公司预计发布首款可折叠iPhone的前半年，一家中国竞争对手已解决了此类设备迄今为止最大的难题：折痕。【原文：Half a year before Apple Inc. is expected to unveil its first foldable iPhone, a Chinese rival has solved the biggest compromise with such devices to date: the crease.】

item.title: 尽管存在伊朗战争风险，策略师们对美股仍持乐观态度
item.description: 华尔街各大银行的策略师表示，尽管伊朗战争带来了风险，但他们对美国股市的投资理由依然成立。【原文：Strategists across Wall Street’s biggest banks say their investment case for US stocks remains intact despite risks posed by the Iran war.】

item.title: Leapmotor 扩大与斯泰兰蒂斯的合作，实现首次盈利
item.description: 中国电动汽车制造商浙江乐派科技股份有限公司凭借强劲的汽车销量实现了首次年度盈利，同时该公司正与Stellantis NV扩大合作。【原文：Chinese electric carmaker Zhejiang Leapmotor Technology Co. posted its first annual profit on strong vehicle sales as it expands its partnership with Stellantis NV.】
